personal.name: Tin
personal.title: Roblox Developer
personal.description: I'm Tin, an Algerian Roblox developer with 5+ years of scripting experience. I write scalable, clean, documented, modular code and love solving complex problems in Luau.
bio: I’ve been on Roblox for over 5 years, and during that time I’ve spent a lot of it scripting and building games. I focus on making systems that are clean, scalable, and actually enjoyable for players to interact with, especially when it comes to UI and multiplayer features.

I like working on gameplay mechanics and making sure everything feels smooth and responsive. Most of my experience comes from building different types of projects, from competitive games to social hangout spaces, and I always try to keep my code organized and efficient.

When I work on a project, I try to keep things simple, communicate clearly, and adapt to whatever the game needs. At the end of the day, I just enjoy turning ideas into something that feels polished and fun to play.
If you need someone who understands how Roblox works and can build things properly without overcomplicating them, I’m down to help.
personal.skills: Luau scripting • Performance & optimization • Systems design

terms.description: Simple and clear terms to keep projects predictable and fair.
items: No refunds after work has started or deliverables have been handed over.
Payment is negotiated directly and depends on project scope and timeline.
Clear, written requirements are required before work begins.
I reserve the right to decline work that conflicts with my values or expertise.
Delivery timelines are estimated per-project and will be included in the agreement.

reviews.description: Client feedback and screenshots from completed work.

contact.description: Open for freelance and team opportunities. Pricing and scope are discussed per project.
